title: gleichenia nuda
intro: Gleichenia nuda is a species of fern in the Gleicheniaceae family, commonly known as the 'naked tree fern'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gleichenia nuda include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as being used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
